# Vendor Images Directory

This directory contains images for each vendor in the application. Below is a list of required images and how to create placeholders.

## Required Images

Please add the following images to this directory:

### Curry King
- curry-king.jpg (Main storefront image)
- chicken-tikka.jpg (Chicken Tikka dish)
- lamb-rogan.jpg (Lamb Rogan Josh dish)

### Noodle Ninja
- noodle-ninja.jpg (Main storefront image)
- pad-thai.jpg (Pad Thai dish)
- ramen.jpg (Ramen bowl)

### Burger Beast
- burger-beast.jpg (Main storefront image)
- beast-burger.jpg (Signature burger)
- veggie-beast.jpg (Vegetarian option)

### Jerk Junkie
- jerk-junkie.jpg (Main storefront image)
- jerk-chicken.jpg (Jerk chicken plate)
- curry-goat.jpg (Curry goat dish)

### Pizza Prince
- pizza-prince.jpg (Main storefront image)
- northern-special.jpg (Northern Special pizza)
- truffle-shuffle.jpg (Truffle Shuffle pizza)

### Dumpling Duke
- dumpling-duke.jpg (Main storefront image)
- pork-dumplings.jpg (Pork dumplings)
- veggie-dumplings.jpg (Vegetable dumplings)

## Image Requirements
- Format: JPG
- Recommended size: 800x600 pixels
- Max file size: 2MB per image
- Aspect ratio: 4:3 (landscape)

## Using Placeholder Images

We've provided multiple options for placeholder images while you collect actual photos:

### Option 1: SVG Placeholders
We've created SVG placeholder files for some vendors that you can use directly:
- curry-king.svg
- noodle-ninja.svg
- template.svg (can be copied and renamed for other vendors)

### Option 2: HTML Generator Tool
Open the `generate-placeholders.html` file in your browser to create and download placeholder images for all vendors. The generator creates colorful, branded placeholders that you can save directly to this folder.

### Option 3: Automatic Fallbacks
The app has built-in fallback support for missing images. If an image isn't found, a colorful placeholder will be generated automatically with the vendor's name.

Please ensure all images are high quality and properly represent the food items and storefronts.
